allow: Bash(node -e "try { const f = require\('ffmpeg-static'\); console.log\('ffmpeg-static path:', f\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('not installed globally'\); }")
Bash(node -e "try { const f = require\('ffprobe-static'\); console.log\('ffprobe-static path:', f.path\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('not installed globally'\); }")
Bash(node -e "const e = require\('electron'\); console.log\(typeof e, JSON.stringify\(Object.keys\(e || {}\)\).slice\(0,200\)\)")
